fs.notes: The shared sync fs bridge is cataloged here to document overlap with future WinterTC-style profiles, but no WinterTC fs surface is claimed yet.

crypto.notes: The current WinterTC crypto profile covers randomUUID, getRandomValues, stable subtle object identity, Promise-backed subtle.digest over the SHA digest family, Promise-backed HMAC generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-GCM generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-CTR generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-CBC generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats with PKCS#7 padding, Promise-backed AES-KW generateKey/importKey/exportKey over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed subtle.wrapKey/subtle.unwrapKey dispatching on either AES-KW or AES-GCM as the wrap cipher, over the raw and jwk formats, wrapping HMAC and AES-GCM/CTR/CBC/KW inner keys, Promise-backed PBKDF2 raw import plus deriveBits/deriveKey to HMAC, AES-GCM, AES-CTR, and AES-CBC, Promise-backed HKDF raw import plus deriveBits/deriveKey to HMAC, AES-GCM, AES-CTR, and AES-CBC, Promise-backed ECDSA P-256 generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over raw (SEC1 uncompressed public only) and jwk key formats with SHA-256/384/512 hashes — sign/verify emit and consume WebCrypto-spec IEEE P1363 fixed-width r||s signatures, generateKey resolves to a CryptoKeyPair — and Promise-backed RSASSA-PKCS1-v1_5 generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over jwk only, at 2048/3072/4096-bit modulus lengths with public exponent 65537, SHA-256/384/512 hashes, generateKey returning a CryptoKeyPair, and Promise-backed RSA-PSS generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over jwk only (same modulus/exponent/hash policy) with per-operation saltLength defaulting to the hash output length when absent — randomized signatures suitable for PS256/PS384/PS512 JWT verification against FIPS 186-5 / PSD2 / PCI DSS v4 compliant IdPs. Other subtle algorithms remain pending.
